description.zh: 这是千岛湖的一段航拍。它使用了一非常高且独特的视角俯瞰千岛湖。站得高看得远，在高处拍摄的千岛湖和坐在船上看到的很不一样。
description.en: This is an aerial photo of Qiandao Lake. It uses a very high and unique perspective to overlook Qiandao Lake. Standing high and looking far, the Qiandao Lake captured from a height is very different from what you see while sitting on a boat.

description.zh: 这是一个位于杭州市千岛湖景区的网红小灯塔。在落日时间会非常美丽、浪漫。
description.en: This is a popular small lighthouse located in Qiandao Lake Scenic Area, Hangzhou. It will be very beautiful and romantic during sunset time.

description.zh: 这段视频是在瑞士的瑞吉山拍摄的，从山坡到断崖，下方就是湖泊是瑞吉山独有的壮观景色。
description.en: This video was filmed on Mount Riji, where from the slopes to the cliffs, the lake below is a spectacular scenery unique to Riji Mountain.
